footer.tagline: Fixing credit profiles with transparency and expertise since 2020.
footer.allRightsReserved: © {{year}} Optimum Credit Repair. All rights reserved.
footer.neverSold: Your information is never sold to third parties.

legal.agreeTerms: I have read and agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
legal.agreeSms: By providing my phone number, I consent to receive text messages from Optimum Financial Group. Message frequency varies. Message & data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out or HELP for help. See our <sms>SMS Terms</sms>.
legal.consentRequired: Please accept the Terms of Service and SMS consent to continue.
legal.documentMetaDescription: Optimum Financial Group legal policies and terms.
legal.adminSectionHint: Edit Terms and Privacy markdown shown on public /legal pages.

hero.body: Our experts remove negative items, dispute errors, and boost your score — fast.
hero.bodyDesktop: Stop waiting for better credit. Our expert team removes negative items, improves your score, and opens doors to better rates and opportunities.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subheading: A simple, transparent process designed to fix your credit efficiently and effectively.
howItWorks.step1Body: Select the package that matches your credit situation and goals.
howItWorks.step2Body: Securely share your credit reports and financial documents.
howItWorks.step3Body: Our experts challenge negative items and dispute inaccuracies.
howItWorks.step4Body: Monitor improvements in real-time via your personal dashboard.

packages.heading: Simple, Transparent Pricing
packages.subheading: Choose the package that fits your needs. No hidden fees, no surprises.
packages.unavailable: Packages unavailable. Please try again later.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by Thousands
testimonials.subheading: Real results from real people. See how we've transformed credit profiles.

register.planHeading: Pick the plan that fits your goals
register.planSubheading: One flat payment per repair plan. Secure checkout and 24/7 portal access included.
register.tradelinePickerHint: Pick one or more authorized-user tradelines. Your total updates as you select.
register.payIncompleteHint: Complete your info, card details, and both agreements to continue.
register.cardError: Please fill in all card details correctly.
register.libraryError: Payment library not loaded. Please refresh.
register.successBody: Payment confirmed! Check {{email}} for your onboarding link.

clientLogin.registeredBanner: Payment confirmed! Your account is ready. Enter your email below and we'll send you a sign-in code.
clientLogin.expiredBanner: Your link has expired. No worries — sign in below with your email and we'll send you a secure code so you can upload your documents.
clientLogin.heading: Welcome back
clientLogin.subheading: Enter your email to receive a secure one-time sign-in code.
clientLogin.noAccount: Haven't started your credit journey yet?

adminLogin.heading: Sign in to Console
adminLogin.subheading: Enter your admin email to receive a secure one-time sign-in code.

onboarding.expiredBody: Onboarding links are valid for 72 hours and can only be used once. Sign in to your portal to upload your documents and get started.
onboarding.footer: This secure link is valid for 72 hours and can only be used once. Your documents are encrypted with AES-256.

dashboard.title: Welcome back, {{name}}!
dashboard.description: Here's a snapshot of your credit repair journey.

documents.title: My Documents
documents.description: Upload these to verify your identity. Our team reviews each document within 1 business day.
documents.allApprovedNote: Your file has been moved to the next stage. Our team will begin working on your case.
documents.ssnDesc: Clear photo of your SSN card, or a W-2 showing the full number
documents.proofOfAddressDesc: Utility bill, lease, or bank statement — no older than 3 months
documents.encryptedBody: All uploaded files are secured with AES-256 encryption. Only authorised Optimum Credit staff can access them for review purposes. Your data is never shared with third parties.

contract.heading: Service Agreement
contract.signedDate: Signed on {{date}}. A copy was emailed to you.
contract.unsignedSub: Read and e-sign to authorize us to dispute items on your behalf.
contract.agreeCheckbox: I have read and agree to the Service Agreement and authorize Optimum Credit Repair to act on my behalf.
contract.signError: Please type your full name and agree to the terms.

reports.heading: Progress Reports
reports.subheading: Detailed breakdown of every dispute round.
reports.emptyNote: Your first round summary will appear here once we complete your initial dispute round.

support.heading: Support
support.title: Support
support.createTicketDesc: Select the type of issue so we can route it to the right team.
support.subjectPlaceholder: Brief title — e.g. "Unrecognized charge on May 12"
support.faqCtaEnd: and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

billing.label: Billing & Payments
billing.hint: Include your invoice number or payment date. Our team resolves billing questions within 1 business day.
billing.placeholder: e.g. I see a charge dated May 12 for $99 that I don't recognize. My plan is the Standard package.

documents.label: Documents & Files
documents.hint: Mention the document type (credit report, ID, etc.) and when you tried to upload it. Screenshots help!
documents.placeholder: e.g. I tried uploading my Experian credit report PDF (March 2026) but the upload shows a spinner and never completes.

process.label: Credit Repair Process
process.hint: Tell us which dispute round or bureau is affected. Include your Smart Credit score if you have it.
process.placeholder: e.g. Round 2 finished 3 weeks ago but I haven't received any updates. My Experian score was 582.

technical.label: Technical Issue
technical.hint: Tell us what page or feature you were using and exactly what error message (if any) appeared.
technical.placeholder: e.g. When I click Sign Contract I get a white screen with the message 'Something went wrong'. Using Chrome on iPhone.

other.label: Other / General
other.hint: Describe your question or concern in as much detail as possible so we can route it to the right team member.
other.placeholder: Describe how we can help you…

validation.subjectMin: Please write a more descriptive subject
validation.bodyMin: Please add at least 20 characters so we can help you better

profile.heading: My Profile
profile.subheading: Manage your account info and credit-monitoring connection.
profile.name: Name
profile.smartCreditDesc: We use Smart Credit to pull your three-bureau report and track score changes after every dispute round.
profile.connected: Connected — your credit monitoring is active
profile.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the portal.

payments.pageDesc: A full history of your transactions.

peaceOfMind.notEligible: This plan is available after you complete your credit repair program.
peaceOfMind.active: Your Peace of Mind subscription is active
peaceOfMind.subscribeFailed: Could not start subscription. Please try again.
peaceOfMind.paymentLibraryError: Payment library not loaded. Please refresh.
peaceOfMind.orEnterNewCard: Or enter a new card below

tasks.heading: Onboarding Tasks
tasks.subheading: Complete the following tasks to finish setting up your account.
tasks.allDone: All tasks complete — you're all set!
tasks.empty: No tasks have been assigned yet.
tasks.dropOrClick: Drop file here or click to browse
tasks.signInstructions: Please read the entire document before signing.
tasks.scrollToRead: Scroll down to read the full document before signing
tasks.agreeCheckbox: I have read and agree to the terms of this document.
tasks.signNameRequired: Please enter your full name to sign.
tasks.agreeRequired: You must check the agreement box.

videos.heading: Build Your Credit Knowledge
videos.subheading: Expert videos, guides and resources to help you understand credit and accelerate your journey.

reportWizard.title: OFG Progress Report — {{name}}
reportWizard.uploadIntro: This joins two credit report PDFs into one branded 3-page OFG progress report: enrollment (before) + current (after). We extract scores and negative items for your review before publishing.
reportWizard.beforeReportHint: Usually the Smart Credit PDF from when the client started.
reportWizard.afterReportHint: The latest credit report PDF to compare against enrollment.
reportWizard.highlightHint: Call out one removal on the wins table (e.g. a collection that dropped).
reportWizard.tradelineRecHint: Adds a coded tradeline tip on page 3 (IH-1 style — never real cardholder names).
reportWizard.tradelineRecLegend: Adds a short tradeline tip on page 3, coded as IH-1 (never real cardholder names — compliance). Example: “Projected +15–25 points when reporting updates.”
reportWizard.fundingNoteHint: Adds a short “on track for funding” note on page 3 (no guarantees).
reportWizard.fundingNoteLegend: Adds a soft funding line on page 3, e.g. “On track for improved funding readiness…” (no score or funding guarantees).
reportWizard.spanishLocaleHint: Labels, action plan, and CROA disclosure in Spanish.
reportWizard.spanishLocaleLegend: Switches report labels, action plan, and CROA disclosure to Spanish.
reportWizard.extracting: Extracting scores and tradelines from both PDFs…
reportWizard.reviewIntro: Review extracted data against the source PDFs. Low-confidence scores are flagged for manual verification.
reportWizard.complianceAttestation: I verified scores and removed items against the source credit reports. This report will include the required CROA disclosure.
reportWizard.scoreAnomalyHint: Large drops usually mean a mis-read score (wrong PDF or extraction). Fix the Before/After numbers above, then preview again. Preview is allowed so you can verify; publishing requires an extra acknowledgment.
reportWizard.scoreAnomalyAckTitle: I confirm these score drops are accurate
reportWizard.scoreAnomalyAckBody: I double-checked the source PDFs and accept publishing with the large bureau score drop(s) shown in review.
reportWizard.previewIntro: Review the generated 3-page OFG report before publishing to the client portal.
reportWizard.publishedBody: Round {{round}} report is live in the client portal. Pipeline stage updated and client notified.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
